title: Building a Conversational Agent for Education
scenario: Design a conversational agent that provides educational content and support to students, including homework help, test preparation, and career guidance. The target LLM output should be a detailed design document outlining the agent's capabilities, dialogue flow, and potential FAQs. Ensure the document is 2-3 pages in length and includes relevant learning objectives.
constraints: Must include learning objectives aligned with Common Core standards
Should include a minimum of 3 educational content types
Should include a diagram of the student journey

evaluationCriteria.description: Are the included learning objectives aligned with Common Core standards?
Are the included educational content types relevant to student support?
Is the dialogue flow diagram clear and easy to understand?
Are the FAQs relevant to educational support?
